info.title: GL.iNet Router 4.x API — ovpn-client module
info.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 API exposed at POST /rpc on GL.iNet routers. All methods use JSON-RPC method `call` with params = [sid, module, function, args?]. Auth is a separate challenge/login flow yielding `sid`.

passed.description: files that w/o askpass or auth-user-pass

err_code.description: Error Code(-10：parameter missing -11：dual vpn client conflict, as proxy mode doesn't allow dual vpn client)

methods.name: ovpn-client.get_config_list
methods.summary: get ovpn client config of a group

client_auth.description: client Authentication Mode 1:only certificate 2:onely username/password 3: username/password and certificate

methods.name: ovpn-client.clear_config_list
methods.summary: remove all ovpn client config of a group

schema.description: client Authentication Mode 1:only certificate 2:onely username/password 3: username/password and certificate
client authentication mode 1:only certificate 2:onely username/password 3: username/password and certificate

methods.name: ovpn-client.get_third_config
methods.summary: get third provider's ovpn client config

err_code.description: Error Code(-10：parameter missing -11：uci config missing -12：group missing -13：password missing -14：country info empty -15：unknown service provider)

schema.description: group auth type(0/1/2), added from sdk 4.0.1. 0: no ask-user-pass 1: ask-user-pass 2. reserved

group_type.description: group type 1:preconfigured group 2:manually added group 3:group added by app

auth_type.description: auth type 0: no ask-user-pass 1: ask-user-pass 2. reserved

methods.name: ovpn-client.get_all_config_list
methods.summary: get ovpn client config of all group

group_type.description: group type 1:preconfigured group 2:manually added group 3:group added by app

auth_type.description: auth type 0: no ask-user-pass 1: ask-user-pass 2. reserved

client_auth.description: client authentication mode 1:only certificate 2:onely username/password 3: username/password and certificate

clients.name: AirVPN
clients.location: United States, Chicago; United States, New York

err_code.description: Error Code(-10：parameter missing, -11: conflict between the group type and the uploaded conf file type, type is defined by Attributes: auth-user-pass and askpass)

methods.name: ovpn-client.get_route_list
methods.summary: get ovpn client custom route list

err_code.description: Error Code(-10：parameter missing -11：uci config missing -12：group missing -13：password missing -14：country info empty -15：unknown service provider -16: too much config to load)
